title: Administrative Assistant (Temp)
description:
During peak seasons of Senior Official Meetings, an Administrative Assistant is required to assist existing Program Executives (PEs) with the high amount of administrative tasks. E.g.:

  • Assist PEs (max 2 PEs) with administrative work (e.g. filing emails, renaming documents).
  • Perform basic internet searches on airfare rates to assist with approvals of airfare quotations. 
  • Prepare travel undertakings. 
  • Compile and submit reimbursement claims for travelers attending project activities/ events.
  • Perform any other administrative duties as assigned.
  • Send out Remittance Advice emails.

Education:
At least ‘A’ Level or Higher Nitec Certification (fresh grads are welcome to apply)

Relevant experiences:
3 to 5 years’ experience in administration and Project Management

Skill sets:

  • Proficient in MS Office, MS 365 applications and Adobe Acrobat.
  • Strong coordination skills.
  • Strong command of written and spoken English.
  • Able to multi-task and sharp at spotting errors.
  • Proven track records of good performance.
  • Project Management skills.

Desired competencies (Essential / Critical):

  • Good organizational skills with an eye for details.
  • Pro-active and able to work independently.
  • Able to multitask.

postedCompany.description:
The Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation (APEC) is a regional economic forum established in 1989 to leverage the growing interdependence of the Asia-Pacific. APEC's 21 members aim to create greater prosperity for the people of the region by promoting balanced, inclusive, sustainable, innovative and secure growth and by accelerating regional economic integration.

The APEC Secretariat is based in Singapore and operates as the core support mechanism for the APEC process. It provides coordination, technical and advisory support as well as information management, communications and public outreach services.

The APEC Secretariat performs a central project management role, assisting APEC Member Economies and APEC fora with overseeing more than 250 APEC-funded projects. APEC's annual budget is also administered by the APEC Secretariat.
postedCompany.name: Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation (APEC) Secretariat

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
